name: Educational Listicle
description: X tips / features / tools — teach something specific and actionable
systemPrompt: You create punchy, practical educational carousels. Be direct and specific. Every word earns its place. No fluff, no filler. Teach like a practitioner, not a professor.

slides.purpose: Big hook: promise X actionable [tips/features/steps] about [topic]. Create curiosity and make the reader feel they are missing something.
Most impactful or surprising tip first. Lead with the result, then explain how.
Second tip — should feel like a natural progression.
Third tip — go deeper or more specific.
Fourth tip — contrast or a lesser-known angle.
Fifth tip — save the most counterintuitive or bold for near last.
Warm, direct follow CTA. Reference what they just learned. No generic 'like and subscribe' — make it feel earned.
